parsed.production_notes: The human character exhibits slightly uncanny, stiff facial movements and imperfect lip-sync typical of AI avatars. The lighting on the human remains perfectly consistent despite changing background environments, indicating the use of background plates. The robot character is clearly a 3D/AI generation.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, muscular build, tan complexion. He has short dark hair with a fade and a neatly trimmed dark beard.
characters.wardrobe: Cream-colored, short-sleeve polo shirt with a textured, waffle-knit pattern. He wears a thin gold chain necklace and a gold bracelet on his right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, conversational, and slightly exaggerated in his expressions.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot face with smooth white casing, visible panel seams, and bright blue eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Traditional red and white checkered keffiyeh secured with a black agal.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, nighttime city skyline visible through a window, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits in a dimly lit room, facing slightly to the left as if addressing someone off-camera. The background features a blurred nighttime city skyline seen through a window. Warm, directional lighting highlights Character A's face and the texture of his shirt. He gestures with his hands while speaking, maintaining an earnest expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows Character A in an interview setting, speaking to an unseen person. Text overlays in Arabic and English appear on screen, emphasizing his spoken words. The overall tone is serious and instructional.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: أبداً. لا تقول "I'm fine, thank you". [Never. Don't say "I'm fine, thank you".]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ابدأ بالتحدث باللغة الإنجليزية بطلاقة! (Start speaking English fluently!)
أبداً لا تقول (Never say)
"I'm fine, thank you".
Learna AI

scenes.setting: Upscale restaurant, warm ambient lighting, blurred background with tables and lights.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated at a table in a softly lit, upscale restaurant. He holds a fork in his left hand and a knife in his right, resting them on the table. He looks directly at the camera with a slightly confused and awkward expression. The background is blurred, showing warm ambient lights and other empty tables.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is shown in a restaurant setting, looking awkward as he recites common English phrases. Red cross marks appear over the text overlays of the phrases he says, indicating they are incorrect or unnatural. The scene highlights the discomfort of not knowing what to say.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I'm fine, thank you.
Character A says: I don't know.
Character A says: You're welcome.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Learna AI
I'm fine, thank you 🔴
I don't know ❌
You are welcome ❌

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, nighttime city skyline visible through a window, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is back in the dimly lit room with the city skyline background. He faces slightly left, gesturing emphatically with his hands as he speaks. He then turns his head to look directly at the camera, pointing towards the viewer with a confident expression.

scenes.visual_description: Character A returns to the interview setting, explaining his past struggles with English. He then introduces the solution, pointing to the camera to transition to the next scene. Arabic text overlays accompany his speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: حتى أنا كنت أتكلم چذي. [Even I used to speak like this.]
Character A says: لين بديت أتدرب ويا Learna! [Until I started practicing with Learna!]
Character A says: دعني أريك إياه. [Let me show it to you.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
حتى أنا كنت أتكلم چذي. (Even I used to speak like this.)
لين بديت أتدرب ويا (Until I started practicing with)
Learna!
دعني أريك إياه (Let me show it to you)
Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B, the robot avatar, is positioned in the foreground, facing directly forward. The background is a softly blurred domestic setting, likely a living room, with light-colored walls and indistinct shapes of furniture. The robot's mouth moves as if speaking, and its expression is friendly.

scenes.visual_description: The robot avatar, Character B, introduces the app. A large smartphone displaying the app's interface is overlaid next to the robot, showing various screens and features. Arabic text overlays highlight the key benefits of the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: هلا والله. [Hello there.]
Character B says: تدري إنك تقدر تتكلم إنجليزي مثل الأجانب في 1 أسبوع بس! [Did you know you can speak English like foreigners in just 1 week!]
Character B says: هذا مو سحر، هذا Learna. [This is not magic, this is Learna.]
Character B says: أبلكيشن يصحح لك وين تسولف ويعلمك بدون ما تحس أصلاً. [An application that corrects you while you chat and teaches you without you even noticing.]
Character B says: يلا، خلونا نجرب هو سوا. [Come on, let's try it together.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
هلا والله. (Hello there.)
تدري إنك تقدر (Did you know you can)
تتكلم إنجليزي (speak English)
مثل الأجانب (like foreigners)
في 1 أسبوع بس! (in just 1 week!)
هذا مو سحر، (This is not magic,)
هذا LEARNA أبلكيشن (this is LEARNA application)
يصحح لك وين تسولف (corrects you while you chat)
ويعلمك بدون (and teaches you without)
ما تحس أصلاً. (you even noticing.)
يلا، (Come on,)
خلونا نجرب (let's try)
هو سوا. (it together.)
Learna AI

scenes.setting: Top: Solid black background. Bottom: Home office with a bookshelf, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B, the robot avatar, is centered against a solid black background. The robot faces forward, its mouth moving as it speaks.

Character A sits at a desk in a home office setting. Behind him is a bookshelf filled with books. A professional microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. He looks directly at the camera, smiling and gesturing as he engages in a conversation.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen conversation between Character B (top) and Character A (bottom). Animated sound waves emanate from the robot in the top panel. Text overlays display their dialogue in Arabic and English, with red crosses and green text indicating corrections made by the AI tutor.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: تتكلم إنجليزي؟ [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: شوي. [A little.]
Character B says: من وين إنت؟ Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Saudi Arabia.
Character B says: قربت. الأحسن تقول "I am from Saudi Arabia." [Close. It's better to say "I am from Saudi Arabia."]
Character A says: آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. [Ugh, I always mess that up.]
Character B says: عشان كذا أنا موجود أساعدك تتكلم صح. [That's why I'm here to help you speak correctly.]
Character A says: بس ما عندي فلوس. [But I don't have money.]
Character B says: إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. [What? You don't need money.]
Character B says: مع Learna تقدر تتمرن إنجليزي ببلاش. [With Learna you can practice English for free.]
Character B says: مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو الكورسات الغالية. [Not like other expensive apps or courses.]
Character A says: من جدك؟ [Are you serious?]
Character B says: أكيد. مافي حركات. [Sure. No tricks.]
Character B says: بس ممارسة محادثة إنجليزي من جد مع مدرس AI. [Just real English conversation practice with an AI teacher.]
Character A says: يعني... مدرس من جد؟ [You mean... a real teacher?]
Character B says: إيه، يصحح لك القرامر والنطق ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. [Yes, corrects your grammar and pronunciation and makes you speak with confidence.]
Character A says: اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. [Okay, then I'll download Learna now.]
Character B says: كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
تتكلم إنجليزي؟ (Do you speak English?)
شوي. (A little.)
من وين إنت؟ (Where are you from?)
Where are you from?
I am Saudi Arabia. ❌
قربت. الأحسن تقول (Close. It's better to say)
"I am from Saudi Arabia."
آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. (Ugh, I always mess that up.)
عشان كذا أنا موجود (That's why I'm here)
أساعدك تتكلم صح. (to help you speak correctly.)
بس ما عندي فلوس. (But I don't have money.)
إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. (What? You don't need money.)
مع Learna تقدر تتمرن (With Learna you can practice)
إنجليزي ببلاش. (English for free.)
مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو (Not like other apps or)
الكورسات الغالية. (expensive courses.)
من جدك؟ (Are you serious?)
أكيد. مافي حركات. (Sure. No tricks.)
بس ممارسة محادثة (Just conversation practice)
إنجليزي من جد مع (real English with)
مدرس AI. (AI teacher.)
يعني... مدرس من جد؟ (You mean... a real teacher?)
إيه، يصحح لك القرامر والنطق (Yes, corrects your grammar and pronunciation)
ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. (and makes you speak with confidence.)
اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. (Okay, then I'll download Learna now.)
كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. (Awesome! Let's speak English together.)
Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, uniform dark blue background fills the entire frame. There are no characters, props, or environmental details present.

scenes.visual_description: The final scene is an end card with a solid dark blue background. It features the app's icon, a call to action in Arabic, and badges for the App Store and Google Play.
scenes.on_screen_text:
تحميل الآن! (Download now!)
ابدأ بالتدرب (Start practicing)
